revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative punctuation
  |name=From an alternative punctuation
  |from=a title with an alternative punctuation of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative punctuations
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative punctuation
  |name=From an alternative punctuation
  |from=a title with an alternative punctuation of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative punctuations
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative punctuation
  |name=From an alternative punctuation
  |from=a title with an alternative punctuation of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative punctuations
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative punctuation
  |name=From an alternative punctuation
  |from=a title with an alternative punctuation of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative punctuations
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative punctuation
  |name=From an alternative punctuation
  |from=a title with an alternative punctuation of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative punctuations
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative punctuation
  |name=From an alternative punctuation
  |from=a title with an alternative punctuation of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative punctuations
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from alternative punctuation |name=From an alternative punctuation |from=a title with an alternative punctuation of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}} |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''. Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s. |all category=Redirects from alternative punctuations }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from alternative punctuation |name=From an alternative punctuation |from=a title with an alternative punctuation of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}} |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''. Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s. |all category=Redirects from alternative punctuations }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s. |all category=Redirects from alternative punctuations }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from alternative punctuation |name=From an alternative punctuation |from=a title with an alternative punctuation of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}} |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''. Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s. |all category=Redirects from alternative punctuations }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
